typography.strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' variant for dark interfaces: Outfit for geometric, premium display headers (bold), Manrope for high-legibility crisp body text. Strict weight contrast: Light vs Bold.
rules: Line Height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.

colors.strategy: ARCHETYPE 4: SWISS & HIGH-CONTRAST (Apple Dark Mode aesthetic). Monochrome dominance. Pure #000000 background to allow colorful 1x1 album arts to pop.
rules: NEVER use pure transparent for headers/overlays; ALWAYS use backdrop-blur with a tinted background (bg-black/40).
Hover states must have higher contrast than default state.
Primary actions must use the 'primary' color #ffffff with black text for maximum high-end contrast.

glassmorphism.implementation: bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-2xl or 3xl, 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/10), shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]. Used exclusively for sticky header and the upscaled beat modal.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-white/10 for subtle separation on admin dashboards.

layouts.strategy: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID but stripped back for the main view. Negative space is paramount.
layouts.header: Sticky top, crystal glassmorphism. Left: 'r1zl410' (text-2xl font-bold tracking-tighter), Right: Instagram icon link.
layouts.main_content: Vertically and horizontally centered container taking full screen height (h-screen).
layouts.carousel: Infinite CSS horizontal scrolling wrapper. Items are 1x1 squares (e.g. w-72 h-72 or w-96 h-96 on desktop). gap-12 between items.
layouts.modal: Absolute center fixed inset-0 z-50. Heavy blur background. Flex container with max-w-5xl. Two columns on desktop: Left (Upscaled cover art 1:1), Right (Title, Audio Player, Pricing options, PayPal CTA).
layouts.admin_dashboard: Strict high-contrast monochrome bento grid. gap-6. Direct grid children.

motion.carousel: 60fps pure CSS transform (translateX) animation moving right to left. Uses duplicated items array. MUST pause on hover (animation-play-state: paused).
motion.beat_hover_trigger: On mouse enter of a carousel item, scale up slightly (scale-105) and trigger the Upscaled Modal opening.
motion.modal_transition: Framer Motion layoutId or AnimatePresence for smooth scale-up from the thumbnail to the center screen. Spring physics (stiffness 300, damping 30).
motion.audio_player: Fluid progress bar using requestAnimationFrame for 60fps smoothness.

accessibility.keyboard_navigation: CRITICAL: When Beat Modal is open, ArrowRight navigates to next beat, ArrowLeft to previous beat, Escape closes the modal.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure text inside modal and audio player has minimum 4.5:1 contrast against modal background.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (Play buttons, Next/Prev buttons, Buy buttons, Login inputs) MUST include `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

images.description: Yellow black checkered pattern for beat 3
Black & white flower in vase for beat 4

icons.strategy: Minimalist outlined icons matching Apple aesthetic.

component_guidelines.carousel: Do not use Shadcn Carousel for the infinite scroll as it handles snap points, not continuous infinite scroll. Build a custom CSS-animated wrapper replicating 'react-fast-marquee' style. Duplicate items array for seamless loop.
component_guidelines.modal: Use Framer Motion AnimatePresence. Backdrop must have backdrop-blur-3xl and bg-black/60. When open, disable body scroll (overflow-hidden on body).
component_guidelines.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary action (Buy/PayPal) must be high contrast (bg-white text-black font-semibold). Hover state: bg-gray-200.
component_guidelines.audio_player: Custom built wrapper around HTML5 Audio. Play/Pause button, interactive progress bar (Tailwind range input or custom div), current time and duration labels.
component_guidelines.pricing_options: Radio group or distinct selectable buttons (Stems, MP3 Only, WAV Only). Selection updates the price dynamically in the UI.
component_guidelines.admin_dashboard: Use Shadcn components heavily customized to be flat, monochrome, with 1px border-white/10. Avoid default Vercel look.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Environment: React + Tailwind + Framer Motion + Lucide React + Sonner. MUST use `.js` extensions for frontend files, NOT `.tsx` since this is a JS project.
2. Theme: Implement a strict dark theme (Background: #000000). Set text color to #F5F5F7.
3. Typography: Load and apply 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text from Google Fonts.
4. Header: Fixed top, flex row, crystal glassmorphism background (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl). Left side: 'r1zl410', Right side: Instagram icon linking to https://www.instagram.com/r1zl410/.
5. Carousel: Implement a smooth, 60fps infinite CSS horizontal marquee holding 1x1 cover arts. Pause the animation on hover. Hide all prices on the carousel items.
6. Beat Modal Interaction: When a user hovers over a beat in the carousel, wait 150ms (debounce), then open the Upscaled Modal in the center of the screen, heavily blurring the background.
7. Inside Modal: Display the upscaled cover art, beat title, custom audio player (Play/pause, progress bar), pricing options (Stems, MP3, WAV), and a PayPal purchase button.
8. Navigation: When the modal is open, attach global keydown listeners: 'ArrowRight' opens the next beat in the list, 'ArrowLeft' opens the previous, 'Escape' closes the modal.
9. Backend/Admin: Build an admin dashboard (protected route) to upload beats (title, image URL/file, audio file, pricing). Use Shadcn UI for forms, tables, and dialogs (styled minimalist).
10. PayPal: Integrate a basic PayPal button checkout flow for the selected pricing option when a user buys a beat.
11. Testing: Ensure data-testid attributes are present on every interactive element.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.js.
general_ui_ux_guidelines: Optical alignment over geometrical alignment. If a button has an icon on the left, use 4px right padding vs 6px all sides.
Images MUST NOT exceed 80vh on mobile devices.
Containers with border must have padding on text content to avoid collision.
Never rely on inheritance for hover text colors. Always explicitly set hover text colors (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
